assertions.reason: The API returned consistent structured error responses for both a missing required query parameter and an unknown route.
evidence: GET /api/region-briefing returned 400 with body {'error': 'Missing iso query parameter', 'code': 'BAD_REQUEST'}
server/index.js line 70 classifies structured error responses and lines 197 and 242 emit BAD_REQUEST and NOT_FOUND payloads

assertions.reason: The backend remained responsive while tracking failed feeds, and the circuit breaker implementation records failures and skips open circuits on later fetches.
evidence: GET /api/health returned 200 while reporting service status=stale and refreshInProgress=True, showing the backend remained responsive during a background refresh.
Health summary reported rssFeedCount=303, failedFeedCount=56, circuitBreaker={'total': 112, 'open': 0, 'halfOpen': 0, 'closed': 112}
server/circuitBreaker.js lines 14, 81, 86, and 115 define thresholding/opening/summary behavior
server/pipeline/fetchSources.js lines 141 and 159 record failures and skip sources whose circuits are open

assertions.reason: Two simultaneous briefing requests both succeeded with matching article counts, demonstrating concurrent request handling without crashes or malformed responses.
evidence: server/index.js line 54 wraps request handlers with timeout protection

frictions: Read-only validation ran while /api/health reported refreshInProgress=true and status="stale", but the backend still served a usable cached snapshot from the last successful ingestion.
